betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Arsenic§f substitutes for §bBismuth§f in certain crafting recipes.

§eObtaining:§f
1. Find §bOily Dirt§f:
   • Near bedrock oil deposits (natural)
   • Created by §bFracking Tower§f environmental damage
2. Acidize Oily Dirt with §bHigh-Performance Solvent§f

§eUses:§f
• Substitute for Bismuth in some recipes
• Useful when Bismuth is unavailable

§eTip:§f If you have a Fracking Tower, check the area for Oily Dirt as an Arsenic source.
